candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' because its value plus 'Other Cost of Sales' equals the selected COGS total in the visible years. Adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Relevant by wording to COGS/cost of revenues, but no visible values are present in the excerpt, so there is no separate amount to add.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS D&A line is embedded within that parent total, so no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related D&A row, but it appears as a sub-component under the selected parent rows 'Selling expenses' and 'Administrative expenses'. In the visible years, each parent approximately equals this D&A line plus the corresponding 'Other ... Expenses' line, indicating inclusion already.

Explicit R&D D&A row, but it is a sub-component of the selected parent row 'R&D expenses' because the parent approximately equals this line plus 'Other R&D Cost'. Also, 'R&D expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would distort the intended subtraction logic.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the sum of 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', 'R&D expenses', and 'Other operating expenses'. The visible SG&A and R&D D&A rows are embedded within those selected parent rows, so no separate XSGA_DA row should be added.
